_about: OpenAI function-calling tool definitions for the Tegro Finance DEX (read-only). Works with NousResearch Hermes (Hermes-Function-Calling format) and any OpenAI-compatible function-calling agent. `routing` maps each tool name to the HTTP call to make against `api_base`. For Claude/Cursor/MCP-capable agents, prefer the MCP server @tegroton/tegro-finance-mcp.

function.name: tegro_get_pools
function.description: List all Tegro Finance DEX liquidity pools with reserves, fees, USD TVL and APYs.

function.name: tegro_get_assets
function.description: List the tradable tokens on Tegro Finance (symbol, decimals, contract address).

function.name: tegro_get_token
function.description: Market data for one token: price_usd, holders, liquidity_usd, mcap, trust_score.

function.name: tegro_simulate_swap
function.description: Quote an exact-in swap: how much of ask_address you'd receive. Read-only; no transaction is built. Amounts are smallest units (amount × 10^decimals). TON sentinel address: EQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAM9c.

offer_address.description: Token you give (TON = the sentinel address)

units.description: Amount of the offer token in smallest units

function.name: tegro_liquid_staking_pools
function.description: List Tegro liquid-staking pools (stgTON and others): apy (percent), min stake, active flag.

function.name: tegro_liquid_staking_rate
function.description: Live rate for a liquid-staking pool: price is the stgTON→TON rate in 1e9 fixed point (only appreciates).
